We design buildings that hold tension between the raw and the refined — structures that anchor memory, shape light, and resist the forgettable.

View Projects → Our Approach →

Our Philosophy

Architecture is the frozen music of human intention — the calculus of shelter, light, and the desire to endure beyond our own brief hour.

Every project begins with a question, not a sketch. We interrogate place, program, and material before a single line is drawn.

01 — Context

Land Before Logic

A building is inseparable from its site. Topography, geology, solar angle, and prevailing wind are primary determinants — not constraints to be overcome but forces to be choreographed.

02 — Material

Honest Construction

We refuse to clad structure in false skins. Concrete expresses formwork; steel reveals its welds; timber shows the grain that counted the years. Honesty in material is honesty in character.

03 — Duration

Design for Centuries

We design against obsolescence. Every detail is considered for its fifth decade, not its first photograph. A building that ages gracefully is the highest compliment an architect can receive.

What We
Build Together

Start a Project →

01

Architectural Design

From concept through construction documents, we deliver buildings of exactitude — plans resolved to the millimetre, elevations considered at every scale of experience, from satellite to skin.

Explore Service →

02

Urban Strategy

Cities are organisms, not machines. Our urban practice reads neighbourhood grain, mobility corridors, and the social contract of public space before proposing any new geometry.

Explore Service →

03

Interior Architecture

We extend structural thinking into interior space — sequencing rooms for narrative, calibrating light for mood, selecting finishes that reward touch and improve with age.

Explore Service →

FORM.STUDIO

An architecture studio practising between discipline and intuition, rigour and wonder. Oslo · Lisbon · Kyoto.
